programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse experiences a variety of flu-like symptoms. None of her doctors are able to discover the cause, until she visits her gynecologist for a routine check-up.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Time of death becomes pivotal after a pregnant woman is found murdered in her air-conditioned bedroom. A striking similarity between her death and an HBO movie gives examiners the clues they need to thaw out the alibi of a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Police were puzzled by an obscure print found at a crime scene where one man had been killed and two teenage girls were seriously injured. Neither of the girls could identify their attacker, but one simple clue helped track the footsteps of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his home and his ex-wife has a perfect alibi. To determine time of death, investigators need to know when the victim ate his last meal. An endocrinologist, a forensic botanist and a short-order cook answer their question.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Soon after organizing a workers' strike, a union official is executed in his home. Neither his wife nor anyone in the neighborhood hear any gunshots. It takes a forensic sound test, an electron microscope and a nightgown to explain why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: A man tells police he shot an intruder who had attacked and murdered his wife. The husband paints a tragic picture and is dubbed a hero. Four years later, forensic evidence leads police to re-examine the motives of this so-called hero.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A police officer accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide. Investigators say it was murder — that it was physically impossible for the woman to have shot herself.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Firefighters find an entire family dead inside their home in an apparent murder-suicide, but there are several inconsistent clues in the rubble. Could ballistics, a time card and some secret audiotapes unravel the mystery?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Two men are murdered while sleeping in their beds. The next night, arson destroys a family planning clinic. Investigators wonder whether some shards of glass, paint chips and a chicken feather could link what appear to be two separate crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators are baffled after finding a murder scene devoid of any physical evidence, but they suspect that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime. If so, forensic scientists would have to find some way to learn what the dog had seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young TV news producer is raped and murdered in her apartment. Police identify two suspects, but both are cleared of any wrongdoing. When the case stalls for more than a year, investigators turn to the Commonwealth of Virginia's DNA Databank.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police are dispatched to the scene of a shooting and discover the victim's husband is one of their own: a homicide detective who says his wife accidentally shot herself in the head.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For years, a woman suffered from what appeared to be the unpleasant side effects of lithium, a drug prescribed to treat bipolar disorder. When she died, investigators had to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a ravine, and crucial evidence has been washed away by severe thunderstorms. Twice, the trail turns cold. Almost 20 years later, an old hat and a chip of stainless steel brings the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an 11-year-old girl disappears from a remote Alaska town, investigators wonder if she has been attacked by a bear or become lost in the dense woods. Eventually, they realize that neither assumption is true.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Just weeks before a witness is to testify against the man accused of sexually assaulting her, she is murdered in the front yard of her own home. Investigators immediately suspect her attacker, but they don't have enough evidence to prove his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For six years, a serial killer prowled the streets of New York City. He wrote letters to police and The New York Post, indicating he would kill twelve people — one for each astrological sign.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep and toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood. Investigators find a suicide note and presume he killed himself until a forensic linguist examines the note.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the summer of 1986, Kathleen Lipscomb's body was found on a deserted road outside of San Antonio. Months and years passed, but the crime was never solved. Finally, a private investigator discovered Kathleen's diary.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A retired police officer is found dead with a single gunshot wound to the head. His wife says the motive was robbery, but later tells police he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A suspicious fire sweeps through an apartment, killing two young women. The cause of the fire and the identity of the victims are unclear, but a closer look at the scene reveals something hidden in the ashes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two different men called police to report the same murder. Apparently, neither one knew that the other had called. The investigation uncovered even more unusual circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman was found in his rental car. Teeth and bone fragments were the only remains. When the victim's wife files an insurance claim for $7 million, investigators seek the help of a renowned forensic anthropologist.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: When a pipe bomb rips through a rural home, police have no idea who is responsible. A 9-volt battery and the remnants of a mailing label ead investigators to the man who made the bomb.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: No one in a quiet residential community saw anything unusual the day one of their neighbors was brutally attacked and murdered. Fingerprints found at the crime scene and surveillance video helped investigators to apprehend the presumed killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When investigators found Bruce Miller dead in the office of his junkyard business, the crime scene was almost pristine. But when a computer forensics expert examined computers owned by the victim's wife and her lover, he found all the evidence needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A drive-by shooting leaves one man dead and another seriously wounded. Cell phone calls and shell casings point to a suspect, but authorities are unable to place him at the crime scene. A forensic geologist proves that dirt is anything but dumb.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #17: Tactics Of Angels
programme.desc: Lupin faces his toughest opponents yet! Four women known as the Bloody Angels are after the strange metallic sphere he stole from Area 51. To get their hands on potential alien technology, they're willing to do anything.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #19: The Elusiveness of the Fog
programme.desc: Lupin's attempt to steal a time machine causes a crazy mishap! Now stuck in ancient Japan, his team and Inspector Zenigata must join forces to get back to their own time. But notorious thief Lupin has enemies everywhere... and everywhen!

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #20: Sweet Lost Night
programme.desc: Turns out the Magic Lamp is real, and Lupin's found a way to steal it! But this genie has a price: to grant his wish, she demands half his memories.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #21: The Last Job
programme.desc: Lupin and his companions have their sights on a Japanese cultural treasure, a priceless Buddha statue. But when a mysterious group of ninja thieves get the jump on them, it might just be the gang's last job!

programme.title: Lupin The 3rd "Good-Bye Partner"
programme.desc: When Zenigata is arrested for suspicion of being part of the Lupin gang, Lupin is talked into stealing Time Crystal to prove Pops' innocence.

programme.title: Lupin The 3rd "Blood Seal of the Eternal Mermaid"
programme.desc: The Mermaid's Scale is a mysterious aquamarine gemstone that Lupin has been hired to steal it... but it turns out to be a forgery. Now, he needs to find the real jewel before it can be used to destroy the whole world!

programme.title: Lupin The 3rd "Prison Of The Past"
programme.desc: When the Lupin gang hears the news that Finnegan Corbett, fondly referred to the 'Modern Day Robin Hood', is finally set to be executed, they travel to Kingdom of Dorrente to break him loose…

programme.title: La venganza de los ex

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega a la villa un nuevo ex y viene dispuesto a la reconciliación. Rocío no está interesada en Daniel, Renata y Sargento dejan que el amor fluya, y Montse y Ernesto anuncian su noviazgo. En la fiesta, Brenda completa su venganza.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Hay un nuevo ex y quiere recuperar a su antigua pareja, pero la cita cambia los planes. Una pareja termina antes sus vacaciones y Spencer se abre con Norma. Rocío hace una visita exprés a la Master Suite. Hay una ceremonia de compromiso.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Entra de sorpresa el último ex y todos quedan en shock. La fiesta de compromiso cierra con broche de oro en la Master Suite. Unos videos le abren los ojos a varios y, en la fiesta final, recuerdan los mejores momentos de las vacaciones.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: En medio de una fiesta, Camilo se casa con David en el peor momento y se abre la Sala Tornado desatando nuevos conflictos. Kim va por Ian, mientras que Suavecito llama a no engancharse con sus parejas.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Karen y Suavecito se van a una cita y se desatan los celos incontrolables de Kim y se despide de Ian. La peluca María José trae revelaciones importantes y llega un nuevo EX a saldar cuentas.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Frida y Brandon se reencuentran y Diana toma cartas en el asunto. Kim y Suavecito se besan apasionadamente pero Ian tiene un As bajo la manga. La llegada de un nuevo Ex y alguien es expulsado.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: La Sala Tornado llama a votaciones. Algunos se van de fiesta a una casa flotante. La salida de Daphne se convierte en el pretexto para hacer explotar una bomba de tiempo que provoca una gran pelea.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La familia vive un viaje a Venecia a tope, junto con Tadeo y Paula la nueva integrante de la familia. Por la noche en Venecia, algo pasa en la habitación de las chicas que traerá cola y que nadie puede terminar de confirmar muy bien

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Una verdadera guerra se desata en la casa desde la llegada de Paula.Parece no tener límite. Luego de que el chisme del que habla toda la casa salió a la luz, Paula pelea muy fuerte con Isaac y todo el mundo reacciona empeorando el descontrol.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Las vacaciones se van terminando y a la vez está a tope. Los chicos están con el nivel de desmadre al 100. Ligues, body shots, guerra de pizza, fiestas desmadrosas y bromas pesadas. Todo esto no hace olvidar que Aranxta se va.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La familia se despide de Italia con la promesa de que el verano próximo se volverán a encontrar más en familia que nunca.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When young attorney Samuel J. Haskins argues his case in court, it's clear he's copying the unusual style of his idol, Ben Matlock. This is flattering until Sam and his girlfriend get tangled up in a blackmail and murder scheme.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Why would anyone confess to a murder they didn’t commit? Ben’s trying to help his reporter friend beat a murder charge, but when she’s caught in a lie even Ben isn’t convinced she’s innocent.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When blackmail leads to murder, the evidence leads straight to Ben’s old reporter friend. With a client who’s not talking, even Ben is starting to have his doubts. While everyone thinks she is guilty, Ben must work hard to prove his friend’s innocence.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock takes the defense of a young attorney accused of murdering her boss, a man she was about to blow the whistle on for sexually harassing his female employees.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock goes head-to-head with a millionaire bent on revenge. Ben has to get inside the mind of a diabolical killer to avenge the death of his best friend.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A frame-up finds Matlock immersed in libel, scandal, and tales of alien spaceships! Delving into the lurid world of tabloid publishing, Matlock and his new investigator, Jerri Stone, sort through the world’s weirdest clues to solve a murder.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock suspects foul play when a college basketball coach is accused of pay-offs, point-shaving, and murder. As tempers flare and accusations run wild, Matlock makes an enlightening discovery, the head of the booster club was bribing recruits

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The attraction is fatal! Matlock defends an obsessive suitor framed for allegedly murdering the love of his life, a dating service candidate so repelled by his presence that she had a restraining order to keep him away.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Joining forces with an old friend and adversary, Julie March, Matlock attempts to reverse a murder sentence and unravel a case of corruption, conspiracy, and perjury.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Beware of the black widow! A jealous girlfriend is a dangerous woman and Ray, one half of the popular Rick & Ray radio talk show, has the bullets in his chest to prove it! Now Matlock must get the evidence he needs to convict, but it won’t be easy.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: One of Ben’s old clients is charged with bank robbery, again. The only witness is a precocious twelve-year-old boy who presents more than a handful of problems for Matlock. One of them is the boy’s fee for helping out. He wants Matlock to defend his dad.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Katie Clark, the new assistant D.A. in town, is trying to juggle the demands of being a single parent and perform a stellar job on her first prosecution case. But, to her horror, she learns that the suspect she’s trying to convict is her former lover.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A surgical mishap and a malpractice suit aren’t the end of Dr. Bradley Gray’s troubles. He’s been murdered! Jerri Stone’s little sister, Nurse Rachel, is the number one suspect.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: An afternoon fishing expedition evolves into a nightmare. Matlock watches in horror as the boat he just disembarked suddenly explodes into a fireball killing his companion, Judge Stern.

programme.title: Body Bizarre
programme.desc: The world's tiniest brothers find out if they'll ever be able to grow.

programme.title: Body Bizarre
programme.desc: A man learns to use a dead man's hand and a teenager has a parasitic twin.

programme.title: Body Bizarre
programme.desc: A woman's arm burns from the inside out.

programme.title: Body Bizarre
programme.desc: A man with half a torso learns if his rare bone-eating disease is back.

programme.title: Body Bizarre
programme.desc: A man with cold-like symptoms loses his limbs and lips.

programme.title: Body Bizarre
programme.desc: A woman suffering from cyclical vomiting syndrome searches for a cure.

programme.title: Body Bizarre
programme.desc: A man's maimed hand is sewn into his stomach to avoid amputation.

programme.title: Body Bizarre
programme.desc: A boy with undeveloped legs walks on all fours.

programme.title: Body Bizarre
programme.desc: Irish twins' muscles and flesh turn to bone.

programme.title: Body Bizarre

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers and Mr. McFeely look at snow globes and see a film about how people make cereal. King Friday says he is the bravest and strongest in the neighborhood. Cereal is falling like snow. Mister Rogers goes to a Tae Kwon Do class.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits the McFeelys, who are watching after young lambs. Handyman Negri and King Friday put on full cereal-proof armor. When their efforts fail, it is clear that Daniel is the only one who can stop the cereal from falling.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers demonstrates how to use tuning whistles. Daniel has the idea to give the cereal to people who might need food. Neighbor Aber brings a forklift to gather all the boxes. Mr. McFeely brings a video about how people make it.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers remembers a time when he visited Jay Styperk, a para-Olympic swimmer. King Friday's crown has gone missing. He hesitantly enters the castle garden, wearing his swimming cap and goggles.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The standoff between Luffy and Don Krieg takes a turn in favor of the Straw Hats when their captain focuses his onslaught on his opponent’s weaponry.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With Don Krieg defeated, Luffy tries to convince Sanji to join up with the Straw Hats. The skilled cook is interested, but he has something to prove before moving on.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With their culinary concerns in good hands, the Straw Hats set off in search of Nami – who’s on a collision course with a deadly foe!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro is captured by Fishman Arlong and learns a shocking secret about Nami. Unable to believe his ears, he puts the navigator to the ultimate test.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew make their way towards Arlong Park and a showdown with its fishy proprietor. Along the way, they discover a treasure map that raises more questions about Nami.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A fierce argument over where Nami’s loyalties lie divides the Straw Hat Pirates and only one thing’s for sure – no one is willing to risk their life for a traitor.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami’s adopted sister, Nojiko arrives to fill in some details about the skilled mapmaker’s younger days.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nojiko continues the story of Nami’s younger days. Back in the present, Nami gets agonizingly close to a long time goal, but betrayal looms on the horizon.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nezumi comes to confiscate Nami’s treasure, but who’s he working for? More importantly, who’s Nami working for, and what’s she gonna do with her booty?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats’ faith in Nami is restored, and now it’s time for a battle royal! Luffy and the gang are determined to make Arlong pay for mistreating their friend.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats and Arlong’s fishermen are locked in a swashbuckling slugfest, but things take a bad turn when Luffy gets trapped beneath the waves.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While his friends work to free the captain of the Straw Hats, cowardly Usopp finds himself in a position to shed his yellow streak and make his father proud.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami must decide between letting Arlong maintain his hold over her, or joining the Straw Hats and leading the oppressed villagers against the tyrant Fishman.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Arlong better watch his back-fins, because Captain Luffy knows about all the horrible things he did to Nami – and it makes his blood boil.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Something about Nami’s former prison gives Luffy an added burst of strength. He’s so moved by her terrible past that he vows to destroy all of Arlong Park!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After a grueling fight, Luffy defeats Arlong and succeeds in destroying his headquarters. The merry marauders enjoy the fruits of victory while Nami makes peace with her turbulent past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Finally, the day has arrived where Luffy’s face is on an authentic wanted poster! Now there are enemies in hot pursuit as the crew makes waves for Logue Town – the final resting place of Gold Roger!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Buggy gets marooned on an island inhabited by unusual creatures and tangles with the island’s caretaker, Gaimon. If he is to finally destroy Luffy, Buggy must cast his lot with a mysterious woman.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Buggy Pirates fight each other for the right to take their lost captain’s place. While they’re busy beating each other’s brains out, a cannibalistic tribe makes plans to have something special for dinner.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats arrive at Logue Town, and each crewmember embarks upon a mission of a more personal nature. While his crew shops, Luffy goes in search of sacred ground.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy has a run-in with Captain Smoker, and his failure to keep a low profile helps Buggy draw a bead on him. Elsewhere, Zoro takes a chance that his skill can overcome a dangerous curse.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp finds an amazing pair of sharpshooter’s goggles, but they lead to a run-in with Daddy the Parent – the greatest gunslinger ever! Now, the Straw Hat marksman is headed for the deadliest of all duels.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A cooking competition with the fiery chef Carmen rekindles Sanji’s dreams of the legendary All Blue.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Buggy and his mysterious female ally trap Luffy on the same platform where Gold Roger was executed. He is to be killed for his offenses against Buggy, but Zoro and Sanji attempt a daring rescue mission.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As a storm batters Logue Town, Buggy, Alvida, and Captain Smoker close in on Luffy for a stirring final showdown!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The discovery of a small girl adrift in an abandoned lifeboat interrupts Luffy and his crew’s voyage to the Grand Line.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After escaping the clutches of the Marine fleet, the Straw Hats soon find themselves in an equally dangerous predicament – stranded in the Calm Belt!

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Energy-eating creatures invade Earth through the Taelons' interdimensional portals and threaten to destroy the planet.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When a recently divorced mother is found strangled to death on her couch, several suspects emerge until the killer is revealed to be someone close to home.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A recently retired woman is found murdered, and detectives struggle with a lack of evidence and try to track down a long list of suspects.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A hard-working young woman is discovered stabbed at the side of a road, leading police on a tireless investigation for 10 years to unveil a killer who is hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: After a 35-year-old analyst for the NSA is fatally stabbed, police look at a number of suspects; detectives close in on the killer, but the investigation takes a shocking turn.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When a 98-year-old widow is found dead in her entryway closet, a chilling discovery leads investigators to a killer in the community who harbors a dark secret.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A beloved resident of a tight-knit Nebraska town is murdered, leading detectives to look at a wide range of suspects before the trail leads to a killer who lives among them.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: After a respected educator and mother of two is found dead in small-town Alabama, the investigation focuses on fraught family relationships, but the discovery of a dark secret unveils a killer no one saw coming.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A civic-minded teen is shot to death in his own bed, but just as investigators are closing in on those responsible, a twist leaves everyone stunned.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A divorced mother of three is stabbed to death while recovering from major surgery, but police are frustrated by a lack of evidence, until a startling admission reignites the case.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When a young woman who was just starting out in life is found assaulted and stabbed to death in her boyfriend's home, detectives work tirelessly to uncover a killer who had previously been above suspicion, leaving the town and police force stunned.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: Police searching for the killer of a beloved grandfather find the murderer close to home wielding a shocking weapon.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A young woman is killed in her bedroom, and the evidence appears to point to a clear suspect, but it takes 30 years and new evidence to reveal a killer hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A glamorous 85-year-old millionaire is found stabbed in her basement, sending police on an international investigation that unearths devilish secrets, double lives and a killer no one saw coming.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When a beloved elderly woman is viciously murdered, detectives discover a chilling connection to another unsolved murder; the trail points to someone from her past and investigators race to hunt the killer down before they can strike again.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: After the burned body of a young nursing student is discovered near a rural road, detectives investigate several suspects until the trail of evidence unearths a disturbing and predatory plot.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When an athletic and popular college student is violently murdered in her apartment, police track down several surprising suspects, including one with a disturbing obsession, before crucial evidence unmasks a dangerous predator no one saw coming.

programme.desc: Farmer Yumi's carrots are disappearing and she calls Ryder and the Paw Patrol for help. /Katie is excited to be entering one of the Paw Patrol pups into a puppy grooming competition "Puptacular" in the next town.

programme.title: Total Riff Off Episode 2: Demon Bat

programme.title: RiffTrax Presents: She Demons

programme.title: Best of RiffTrax: Villains
programme.desc: For this Best of, we wanted to focus on some of the more overlooked villains in our catalogue. Though they may not be iconic, these nefarious scoundrels' deeds are no less evil, their laughter is no less insane, and their ponytails are no less greasy.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Terror at Tenkiller
programme.desc: Follow-up to the rarely seen, totally imaginary films Ennui at Eightkiller and Nausea at Ninekiller, Terror at Tenkiller really brings the goods! And by “the goods” we mostly mean there’s a character named Tor in it.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Fangs Of The Living Dead

programme.title: RiffTrax: House on Haunted Hill: Three Riffer Edition

programme.title: RiffTrax Presents: Frankenstein's Daughter

programme.desc: In the city of Irving, the buyers are on the hunt for old heirlooms. One team scores a locker with a potential 50 grand hit. The big question at this auction: who will find the diamond (or diamonds) in the rough?

programme.title: Storage Wars: Texas

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When a scientist working on stem cell research disappears, Carter, Teal'c and Quinn investigate and discover that the scientist's town is infested with Goa'uld who can only control the citizens by night. Will Carter, Teal'c and Quinn be taken over?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A Goa'uld lord holds O'Neill (Richard Dean Anderson) captive and tortures him for information about the Tok'ra. As O'Neill suffers, Daniel Jackson (Michael Shanks) appears and offers support. Meanwhile, SG-1 races to O'Neill before it's too late.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Quinn is conflicted when a professor from his home planet asks SG-1 to help stage a coup against the Kelownan government in order to stop a civil war. Should SG-1 allow the planet to destroy itself…or are they placing themselves in needless danger?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Two scientists working on an off-world research project witness SG-1 captured in a Goa'uld raid and attempt to rescue them. Little do they know that SG-1 staged the capture in order to infiltrate the Goa'uld and make contact with a Tok'ra informant.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Bernardo Elizondo, un hacendado mayor y adinerado, se enamora de Libia, una joven humilde que enfrenta la furia de sus hermanos porque ella es vista como una prostituta por la gente del pueblo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan quiere marcharse lejos con sus hermanos para que Libia se olvide de ese amor, pero una verdad golpea el honor de la familia Reyes, mientras Bernardo esconde que es un hombre casado.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Al enterarse de la muerte y el engaño de Elizondo, Libia va a la hacienda, se siente desamparada y no aguanta más al ser fuertemente humillada por Gabriela, la viuda de Bernardo, y sus hijas.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan, Óscar y Franco reconocen el cadáver de su hermana y acusan al hacendado como el asesino. Norma Elizondo se opone a las decisiones de su madre y desafía los deseos de su esposo Fernando.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: La vida de José corre peligro cuando el destino se vuelve en su contra y sus secuaces lo traicionan. Esteban trata de escapar del lugar, en ese momento llega Juan con Beatriz para liberar a Paula, a su papá y a Adela.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: José lucha por su vida en el hospital. Emilio del Monte se prepara para retomar su lugar en la familia. Julieta está muy estresada por la liberación de Paula. Le pide a Rosa que la acompañe a la operación del tumor, sin que Juan se entere.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: La verdad sobre el padre de Paula sale a la luz. Lupe rompe el silencio y Modesto tiene una propuesta para Berta. Aún Gaspar, Pedro y Lucas ven a Emilio como el peón de la hacienda. Consuelo tiene síntomas de estar embarazada.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Después de una noche en que los sueños muestran profundos anhelos, José le hace una revelación a Gaspar. Consuelo ya no puede más con el peso del recuerdo de la violación y, al pensar que está embarazada de Nacho, le pide ayuda a Paula.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro sorprende a Rodrigo a punto de entrar al cuarto de Antonia. Max enfurece cuando ve a su madre con Gastón, busca a Valentina y sale golpeado. Alejandro lo salva. Antonia invierte en la bolsa y pierde dos millones de dólares de su hijastra.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: El testimonio de Gertrudis no tendrá valor por su estado mental. Ella le advierte a Alejandro que él será el motivo por el cual las patronas acabarán con el pueblo. Rodrigo cae en la tentación. Gastón hace campaña para las elecciones de San Pedro.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica y Antonia están temerosas por la confesión de Gertrudis. Ricardo siente que avanza en la terapia y aunque llega a casa con mucha pasión, no logra hacer el amor con Patricia. Antonia está loca por Rodrigo. Lucho entra en la casa de Verónica.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Cecilia se hace la prueba y confirma su embarazo de David. Él le dice que no quiere ser padre. Cuando Verónica se entera, abofetea a su hijo. Gastón le cuenta a Rodrigo con lujo de detalles la verdad de los Lobos.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Bernardo Elizondo, un hacendado mayor y adinerado, se enamora de Libia, una joven humilde que enfrenta la furia de sus hermanos porque ella es vista como una prostituta por la gente del pueblo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan quiere marcharse lejos con sus hermanos para que Libia se olvide de ese amor, pero una verdad golpea el honor de la familia Reyes, mientras Bernardo esconde que es un hombre casado.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: After teams volunteer at a local school in Ghana, THE AMAZING RACE makes it's first-ever trip to the Arctic Circle, where one couple finds themselves in an unfortunate position and contemplate making a game changing decision.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A vegetarian racer struggles with a difficult decision when faced with a Norwegian delicacy, and Teams face their fears of heights during a gut-wrenching Roadblock.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers struggle to complete their creative detours before putting in a proper day's work in the fields, where they discover the key to potato farming is manure.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams are clowning around when they learn a traditional Russian circus act, but it's no joke when multiple teams make a critical error and misread a clue, jeopardizing their positions in the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Following a huge mistake, one Racer makes an important decision that will impact their team beyond the finish line and for the rest of their lives.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Tension among the teams runs high when, for the first time ever, two teams are U-turned and have to complete an extra task, jeopardizing their chances of making it to the final four.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: After Racers become violently ill during a challenge, the stress of the Race finally catches up to one team as a Racer threatens to qui.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams travel to South Korea where they battle it out on water and ice to make the final three.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final three teams soar to new heights over Southern California, competing in the final leg for a shot at the million-dollar prize and, for two teams, the chance to become the first ever all-female team to win the series.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Eleven former Teams who fell short of winning the $1 million prize during their first Race around the globe will return for another shot.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams dressed as kangaroos continue through Australia where one Racer reverts to old habits as tempers start to flare, and another Team breaks down in tears from utter exhaustion.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: While in Japan, one team's hopes are shattered after a car crash jolts them to the back of the pack, and Racers get down and dirty in a pile of frigid mud.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The nine remaining teams depart from Commodore Perry's Landing in Kurihama, Japan and travel to their next destination in a race around the world for one million dollars.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The pressure builds when a prehistoric Roadblock pushes one Racer over the edge and a Double U-turn causes panic among the teams as they race to avoid elimination.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Deputy Barney Fife loses his self-confidence when two farmers ignore his warning.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The Mayberry band, composed of more flats than sharps, gets ready for its annual trip to the state band competition.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Floyd the barber has misrepresented his worldly goods to a wealthy window, who decides to visit him.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie becomes jealous when his father appears to be paying special attention to a pretty girl -- even taking her fishing with them.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Three escaped female convicts imprison Barney Fife and Floyd the barber in a remote cabin.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee longs for a pretty bed jacket for her birthday but seems destined to get more practical gifts from her family.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife is convinced that Opie's piggy bank is safer than the Mayberry bank-and sets out to prove his point.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie must either learn how to box or lose prestige among his peers when a new boy moves into town.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney gives a parking ticket to the Governor's car, and refuses to tear it up.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A car containing a high-powered businessman breaks down in low-powered Mayberry.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife is sure that a Main Street gun duel is in the offing when an ex-con comes to town.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Mayberry fears disaster when the sheriff discovers that a farmer's goat has eaten a good-sized meal of dynamite.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney look forward to seeing their high school sweethearts when the Mayberry Class of '45 holds a reunion.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A poor farmer successfully auditions to sing at a concert. Barney and Andy take it upon themselves to spruce him up for the event.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie meets a spoiled youngster and decides his own allowance should be tripled.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy uses common sense and Barney uses modern criminal detection methods to solve several burglaries at a filling station.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The sheriff's knowledge of American history is put to the test by Opie and an attractive new history teacher.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee falls for the sales pitch of a fast-talking medicine man and his Indian elixir.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The sheriff has his hands full as a clan of mountain musicians descend on Mayberry to meet a bus.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: An English tourist works off his reckless driving fine by being a valet and chauffeur for Andy.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Deputy Barney Fife invests his life's savings in a used car that turns out to be a lemon.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie suffers from puppy love so Barney attempts to show him how to handle women.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney decides that it's time to push Andy into matrimony, but Barney's marriage bureau collapses at a frantic dinner party.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A pack of hunting dogs overruns the Mayberry Courthouse just as Andy is trying to impress a visiting state official.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Howard Morris guest stars as Ernest T. Bass as the Darling clan returns to Mayberry with its own kind of mountain trouble.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife becomes super-efficient in executing his duties as a deputy sheriff after two thieves are jailed in Mayberry until their accomplices are captured.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie accidentally kills a bird with a slingshot and becomes foster-mother to her three young birds.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A real Bob Ross classic - the majestic snow-covered mountain, rolling foothills, leafy trees and bushes, and serene lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join artist Bob Ross under turbulent skies as the windy waves rush to crash upon the rocks - all within a pleasing oval shape

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a drive into the country with Bob Ross and pass through an old covered bridge into a landscape bursting with soft fall foliage.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross' easy method once again reveals the splendor of a little farm home in a winter wonderland and soft purple hills.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross' gentle brush strokes create bending palm trees on the edge of a sea coast, just before the water reaches its high point.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: So quickly, Bob Ross paints this beautiful and peaceful mountain valley - so many layers and layers on the canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Even a cold, frozen snowy afternoon can be displayed with signs of astonishing beauty, as portrayed by Bob Ross in this lovely yet simple scene.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross invites you along to enjoy a fabulous mountain lake view with layers of soft hills and trees shrouded in heavy clouded haze.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Find yourself in a place just like this on a warm summer day - Bob Ross creates clear sky and shade trees by a nice swimming spot.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross' exciting use of blue, yellow and orange hues brings vibrancy to this wood side setting and dream cabin beside a clear blue lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A lake and some tall trees pay homage to a commanding mountain in the background, as a cabin stands nearby -- a classic Bob Ross creation.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Guest painter Steve Ross uses lots of color in this stirring depiction of giant peaks behind foothills opening onto a smooth lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross allows the greenery of a deep grove to be barely visible in the light of early morning - all tucked inside an oval.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross captures a real 'dreamscape' on canvas -- soft rolling hills, birch trees and pretty lake; paint along and add your own touches.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Here it is! Impressive skies, misty waters, and snowy mountains - completed by Bob Ross using just his specially designed painting knife!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates a moment in time as the sea finds itself in one of nature's sudden cloudbursts; experience another oval masterpiece!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Explore the backwoods with Bob Ross and happen upon an old, forgotten shanty hidden away in the densest of undergrowth.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A spunky little river meanders its way through an autumn hillside bursting with splashes of color, as only Bob Ross can create!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates a spectacular warm winter painting where snow-covered mountains, trees and bushes lend an alluring sense of beauty in an oval.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: It's such a tranquil day down at the beach! Join Bob Ross as he paints a lovely little rowboat that awaits its owner's return.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates soft purple sky and tall trees that almost seem to float in the hazy foothills of a distant, blue-grey mountain.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The splendor of fall is produced by Bob Ross's red, orange and brown grasses and foliage, softly complimenting a rugged little shed.

programme.title: The Bob Ross Experience
programme.desc: Witness the incredible transformation of Bob Ross's original studio into an intimate museum experience designed for those he inspired.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A different kind of oval today! - Bob Ross paints a pretty, panoramic cold mountain lake scene inside this fun frame.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Out of nowhere appears an unexpected find -- a weathered cottage in the deep forest that Bob Ross places there, in an already perfect setting.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Crisp blue sky and lake embrace soft rolling hills and leafy trees - Bob Ross paints the stillness of evening perfectly on black canvas.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Knight launches a full-on attack to get inside Nany's head and ends up tearing the house and his own relationship with Jemmye apart. And a pending elimination may spell the end for one of the house's budding romances.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: A trip into the Arena leaves two relationships in shambles. And after a trivia competition catapults challengers into the waters below, one team is forced to send members of their own alliance into elimination.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: The animosity between Frank and Alton comes to a head, as Alton's destructive behavior upsets the rest of the house AND threatens to destroy his own team as he begs to be sent into the Arena.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: The San Diego team implodes after Frank & Zach viciously berate Sam for her poor performance in the challenge. And another surprise romance blossoms in the house, but the crush may be one-sided.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: The competitors face off in an eating contest but one team ultimately can't stomach each other as their in-fighting continues to escalate. In the closest elimination yet, two of the season's toughest challengers go neck to neck.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: In a deep-diving competition, two teams break down when they can't handle the pressure. And an all-out knock-down brawl involving the entire house leaves the challengers hating each other even more than they could've imagined.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: With the final looming, tension is high and teams, desperate to make it to the end of the competition, do anything they can to secure a spot, leaving one friendship in ruins.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: The final four teams travel to Namibia and fight tooth and nail for a spot in the Final Challenge in the African desert. Before it's all over, two competitors will be sent packing.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: The top 3 Teams skydive straight into the Final in the desert of Namibia, where one team will win $250,000 and all the glory. But before they get the crown, two teams must deal with weak links that could ruin it all.

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutal—choosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers are driven by jealousy and desire, their desperation is evident in both the crime and their efforts to avoid detection. But forensic science can reveal even the slightest mistake to solve crimes of passion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A New York homebuyer gets more than he bargained for when a house inspection turns up a mummified corpse. For decades, the crime had gone undiscovered. The victim unmissed, and the killer unpunished.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A teenager is abducted on a shopping trip. Two hikers disappear from the Appalachian Trail.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Terrorism: Thanks to new technology and, perhaps, the approaching millennium, terrorism is a growing international threat. The Oklahoma City explosion and the bombing of the World Trade Center are just two of the incidents of this growing problem.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They know as much about crime as any crime fighter, or any criminal. They're the crime writers, and through their eyes we see murder most foul.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: DNA Analysis: With the advent of DNA analysis, just a few microscopic cells found at a crime scene can be used to put a murder behind bars.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. It's providing a challenge to forensic investigators devoted to cracking drug rings.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When lovers turn on each other, or marriages fail, some ruthless spouses find a grisly way to gain an uncontested divorce – with no paperwork. When murder tears lovers apart, forensic science must put piece together the mystery to catch the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Photography has long been a vital tool in homicide investigations. A single image captures enough information to identify a suspect, and to preserve a vital clue long after a witness' memory fades.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Handwriting Analysis: We've all heard that our handwriting tells more about our personalities than we think. Are we risk-takers, have low-esteem, fun loving, or are we capable of murder?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For serial killers, once is never enough. For investigators, the challenge is steep when the killers murder by numbers.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The solution to the most heinous crimes often hinge on the smallest of clues. Investigators must have their eyes trained to find the full story of a murder written in a single scrap of evidence.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.desc: A condemned killer being transported by train murders a marshal and takes Mark hostage.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.desc: To keep his invalid mother happy, an outlaw forces Lucas and Mark to go along with a masquerade that he is the owner of Lucas's ranch.

programme.desc: A sharecropper enters his colt in a horse race hoping to win enough money to buy his farm from the owner who has bet on Mark McCain's entry.

programme.desc: When Lucas hires an ex-con as a ranch hand, the man is the first one under suspicion when a robbery and murder occur in the area.

programme.desc: Lucas helps his former Army captain, now an undercover federal agent, infiltrate a gang of bank robbers.

programme.desc: A scientist creates an android that has the qualities which he feels he's lacking.

programme.desc: A US naval destroyer investigates a mysterious tapping sound coming from a sunken submarine.

programme.desc: A reporter finds himself trapped in a small town where the people have extraordinary powers.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group must figure out how to get out of a precarious situation.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group must defend Alexandria from a threatening outside force.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Whisperers are coming for Hilltop; after Daryl and Lydia's encounter with Alpha, the communities must decide whether to run or fight; Eugene's communication with Stephanie gets complicated.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Michonne takes Virgil back to his mysterious island to reunite with his family; in exchange, Virgil promises weapons that could change the tide of the Whisperer War.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: With Negan's help, Alpha and the Whisperers attack Hilltop.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Heroes and villains reckon with the aftermath of the Hilltop fire; Eugene takes a group on a journey to meet Stephanie, with the hopes of befriending another civilization.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The communities prepare for the final battle of the Whisperer War; meanwhile, Eugene's group encounters Princess.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Beta engages the final battle of the Whisperer War.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie returns, to the dismay of Negan; the trials she endured since leaving have made her harder in order for her and her son to survive; Daryl and Maggie unexpectedly fight an unseen and unknown threat.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Carol find an old cabin that takes Daryl back to his years away from the group after Rick disappeared; he relives the painful memory of meeting a reticent survivor and the toxic events that amplified his relationship with Dog.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: With Maggie's map, Gabriel and Aaron search for food and supplies to bring back to Alexandria; checking out one more location, they chance upon a stash; faith is broken and optimism is fragmented when they are put to the ultimate test.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene, Ezekiel, Yumiko, and Princess are captured and separated by the mysterious troopers that surrounded them at the rail yard; claustrophobic with mounting anxiety, Princess struggles with memories of her traumatic past and plans to escape.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: At the lowest point in their friendship, Daryl and Carol come to a fork in the road and head their separate ways; Carol returns to Alexandria, while Daryl stays on the road, each going into their own type of survival mode.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: With Maggie back at Alexandria, Carol takes Negan on a journey to minimize the increasing tension; here, Negan reflects on his late wife, Lucille, and the events that led him to this point.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Una desaparición misteriosa pone en peligro los planes para el futuro de Rick y divide al grupo mientras construyen un puente.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: La visión de Rick de un futuro civilizado se ve amenazada por un cúmulo de traiciones y agravios pasados que nunca fueron vengados ni perdonados.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick se ve obligado a enfrentar el pasado en su intento por proteger a las comunidades y el futuro que Carl y él concibieron.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Seis años después de la desaparición de Rick, un grupo recién llegado a Alexandria, liderados por la temperamental Magna, genera problemas a los habitantes de la comunidad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene está solo y en peligro, perseguido por una horda de zombis que, aparentemente, hablan. Mientras tanto, Michonne guía al grupo de Magna hasta Hilltop, donde esperan ser aceptados como nuevos miembros de la comunidad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl, Jesus y Aaron encuentran a Eugene, pero la horda de zombis parlantes los persigue incansablemente. Entretanto, en Alexandria, Negan escapa de su confinamiento porque a Gabriel se le olvida cerrar la puerta de su celda.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los grupos individuales están convencidos de que pueden construir un futuro mejor por separado, pero la pérdida de un miembro los lleva a unir fuerzas. Se revela una amenaza perturbadora y peligrosa.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl libera a Henry porque le estaba contando demasiadas cosas a Lydia y, después, interroga a la adolescente sobre su grupo. Entetanto, el grupo de Magna desobedece a Tara y se adentra por la noche en el bosque en busca de Luke.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo de salvajes que lidera Alpha ataca Hilltop para recuperar a su hija. Mientras tanto, una misión en busca de suministros se convierte en una lucha entre la vida y la muerte.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Henry encuentra a Lydia, pero Beta, la mano derecha de Alpha, lo captura. En Alexandria, Michonne discute con el consejo si deben participar en la feria con el resto de las comunidades.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl, Connie, Henry y Lydia se ocultan en un edificio para tenderle una trampa a Beta. Mientras tanto, el Reino sufre la amenaza de un grupo de extorsionistas que patrulla las carreteras y exige dinero a cambio de transitar por ellas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Se descubre el espeluznante origen de las misteriosas cicatrices que Michonne y Daryl lucen en la espalda, el motivo por el cual la actitud de Michonne hacia los forasteros cambió tanto desde la desaparición de Rick.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Por primera vez en años, las cuatro comunidades se reúnen durante la feria que organiza el Reino. Alpha aprovecha la ocasión para infiltrarse de incógnito entre los visitantes de la feria.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Se desata una tormenta de nieve terrible que sorprende al grupo de Ezekiel viajando hacia Hilltop. Su única esperanza reside en cruzar la frontera que estableció Alpha y acortar el trayecto a través del territorio que tienen prohibido pisar.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En Oceanside, el grupo continúa entrenando en caso de que los Susurradores regresen. Las tensiones aumentan, mientras los supervivientes tratan de aferrarse a lo que queda en pie de su concepto de civilización.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon seek the reason why the life of a federal judge is being threatened.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The apprentices learn how to frame a wall in the master bedroom, build a drain stack for the master bath, and lay decking on the front porch. The homeowners visit their kitchen cabinet designer.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Flooring is used to make a barn door. Roger teaches a horticulture class. Tommy and Charlie find an uninsulated crawl space. The garage floor gets radiant heat and the front porch gets columns.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard helps a homeowner install a new "dual flush" water-saving toilet, the guys ask, "What is it?" and Roger and Kevin head install an in-ground sprinkler system any homeowner can install.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard helps a homeowner install a new type of "zoning" control for her forced-air heating and cooling system, the guys ask "What is it?" and Tom helps re-grout a homeowner’s bathroom tile floor.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom prepares concrete basement walls for finished wallboard. Richard shows Kevin how to tie a few basic knots, the guys ask "What is it?" and Roger demonstrates how to care for storm-damaged trees.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom Silva helps a homeowner install a new garage door. Then Richard Trethewey shows a homeowner how to "winterize" his plumbing to prevent frozen pipes when the house is unoccupied.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin helps a homeowner install a new bathroom ventilation fan, the guys ask "What is it?" and Roger shows homeowners how to care for their lawn without using chemicals or pesticides.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard repairs a leaking PVC drain trap underneath a kitchen sink, the guys ask: "What is it?", Tom installs a new, bamboo "floating" floor and Roger shows how to clean roof gutters without a ladder.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger Cook kicks off our 8th season by building a cozy campfire pit in a homeowner’s backyard, the guys ask "What is it?" and Tom installs a range hood and microwave over a homeowner’s stovetop.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin and an electrician to install a home intercom system, the guys ask, "What is it?" and Richard makes a wood-burning fireplace cleaner and more energy efficient by installing a gas-burning insert.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger transforms a small urban backyard into a pleasant outdoor living space, the guys ask, "What is it?" and Tom shows Kevin new ways to install fiber cement siding without creating a lot of dust.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom installs new aluminum gutters and downspouts, the guys ask, "What is it?" and Richard helps a homeowner install a new energy-efficient clothes washer and dryer.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom Silva helps a pair of homeowners install a new sliding glass door. Afterward, Tom, Kevin O'Connor, landscaper Roger Cook and plumbing and heating expert Richard Trethewey ask, "What is it?"

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger joins plant expert Carrie Kelly to learn about container gardening. Tom and Kevin discuss different flooring. Kevin helps a homeowner install a new rooftop antenna for his digital TV.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The apprentices get a lesson in roofing, Kevin watches how an elaborate Chippendale railing is put together, the basement gets moisture prevention, and Richard shows how ductwork is put together.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin reviews the progress being made upstairs. Most of the new work is at the back of the house. New gas lines are installed. Tommy builds a shower bench and double hung replacement windows.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Granite is laid for the stove. Nathan installs a porch ceiling. Kevin sees a Rhode Island home with pine trim. Richard reviews component placement at the mechanical wall. Mauro fixes holes in plaster.

programme.title: This Old House

programme.title: Michael Carabajal vs Jorge Arce
programme.desc: On July 31st, 1999 Michael Carabajal faced Jorge Arce for the WBO World Light flyweight title at Plaza de Toros El Toreo in Tijuana in a 12 round bout that went 11 rounds giving the bout to Carabajal.

programme.title: Micky Ward vs Alfonso Sanchez
programme.desc: On April 12th, 1997 Micky Ward and Alfonso Sanchez faced eachother at the Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas the 10 round bout ended after seven giving Ward the victory by technical knockout.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Shane Mosley
programme.desc: On November 10th. 2007 Miguel Cotto fought Shane Mosley at Madison Square Garden in New York City for the WBA World welterweight title in a full 12 round bout that ended in a unanimous decision victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Mac Foster
programme.desc: On April 1st, 1972 Muhammad Ali and Mac Foster fought in a fifteen round bout that ended in a unanimous decision win for Ali.

programme.title: Teofimo Lopez vs Pedro Campa
programme.desc: On August 13th, 2022, Teofimo Lopez fought Pedro Campa for the NABF & WBO International Super Lightweight Titles in Las Vegas. Teofimo looked confident and quick from the start, wearing down Campa until he finally stopped him in the 7th round.

programme.title: Teofimo Lopez vs William Silva
programme.desc: On July 14th, 2018 Teofimo Lopez and William Silva fought for the vacant WBC Continental Americas lightweight titles with Silva going down 3 times Lopez secured the technical knockout win in the sixth round.

programme.title: Antonio Margarito vs Miguel Cotto 1
programme.desc: On July 26th, 2008, Antonio Margarito fought Miguel Cotto for the WBA World Welterweight Title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas, in a very close and entertaining fight.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Kelson Pinto
programme.desc: On September 11th, 2004 Miguel Cotto faced Kelson Pinto at the Coliseo Jose Miguel Agrelot in Hato Rey in battle for WBO World Super lightweight titles with the bout ending halfway through in the sixth round securing the win for Cotto.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Sergio Martinez
programme.desc: On June 7th, 2014 Miguel Cotto and Sergio Martinez fought eachother for the WBC world middleweight titles in a bout that ended early in the tenth round with a victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Alex Saucedo vs Abner Lopez
programme.desc: On March 10th, 2018 Alex Saucedo faced Abner Lopez for the WBO and NABO Super lightweight title at the StubHub Center in Carson.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs James Toney
programme.desc: On November 18th, 1994, Roy Jones Jr fought James Toney for the IBF Super Middleweight Title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Jones displayed his exceptional athleticism and speed, outclassing Toney to win a unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs Percy Harris
programme.desc: On December 5th, 1992 Roy Jones Jr. fought Percy Harris for the WBC Continental Americas Super Middleweight title at the Trump Taj Mahal in Atlantic city with Jones defeating Harris in the 4th round by technical knockout.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs Thomas Tate
programme.desc: On May 27th, 1994 Roy Jones Jr. went up against Thomas Tate in a 12 round bout for the IBF World Middleweight title that ended in the second round by technical knockout giving Jones Jr. the win.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Yuri Foreman
programme.desc: On June 5th, 2010, Miguel Cotto defeated Yuri Foreman at Yankee Stadium, claiming the WBA Super Welterweight title. Foreman's knee injury hindered his performance and Cotto won by TKO in the 9th round.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Zab Judah
programme.desc: On June 9th, 2007, Miguel Cotto fought Zab Judah in a welterweight championship bout at Madison Square Garden in New York. Cotto emerged victorious with a TKO in the 11th round, solidifying his reputation as a formidable welterweight champion.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Joshua Clottey
programme.desc: On June 13th, 2009, Miguel Cotto fought Joshua Clottey for the WBO World Welterweight Title at Madison Square Garden in New York. Despite Clottey landing more shots, Cotto was persistent with his attack, helping him earn a close split decision win.

programme.title: Evander Holyfield vs George Foreman
programme.desc: On April 19th, 1991, Evander Holyfield fought George Foreman for the WBC, WBA, and IBF Heavyweight Titles in Atlantic City. Both fighters displayed incredible skill and resilience, but Holyfield ultimately emerged victorious after 12 rounds.

programme.title: Humberto Soto vs Urbano Antillon
programme.desc: On December 4th, 2010, Humberto Soto fought Urbano Antillon for the WBC World Lightweight Title at the Honda Center in Anaheim. In a very close fight that could have gone either way, Soto came out on top victorious via an unanimous decision win.
